results.rendered_html:
arthavat a.
1 Wealthy, rich;  R. 14. 23. 
2 Significant, full of sense or meaning; arthavān khalu me rājaśabdaḥ  Ś. 5 ;  Pt. 1. 136 ;  Ki. 3. 51. 
3 Having meaning; arthavadadhāturapratyayaḥ prātipadikaṃ  P. I. 2. 45. 
4 Serving some purpose; successful, useful; sa pumānarthavajjanmā  Ki. 11. 62 ; 10. 62. 
— adv. According to a purpose.
— m.
— (vān) A man.
